name: Goline & Roland Law Firm, PLLC

websiteQuality.rationale: Modern, HTTPS-secured template site with a mobile-specific nav menu, viewport meta tag, LegalService schema (address, geo, phone), meta description, and prominent 'Contact Us Today' CTAs with click-to-call numbers for both offices. Trust signals include a results page, testimonials, Super Lawyers Rising Stars (Theresa Goline, 2023-2026) and an Avvo Client's Choice badge, though the badge is dated 2015 and only 16 of 28 homepage images carry alt attributes. There is no online appointment-booking widget — intake runs through a validated contact form (with SMS consent) and phone only — which keeps the site solid but short of a top-tier conversion experience.

factors.mobileUsability: Viewport meta present (initial-scale=1, though missing width=device-width); dedicated mobile nav element ('mbl-nv') and responsive utility classes throughout; click-to-call links in header.
factors.pageSpeed: Not directly measured (no lab tooling available). Inference only: ~173 KB homepage HTML with 13 script tags including third-party trackers (Facebook pixel, Google Maps embed) — moderate page weight, likely average real-world performance.
factors.accessibility: Partial image alt coverage (16 of 28 images have non-empty alt attributes); form fields have validation messages; no obvious skip-link or ARIA landmarks observed in header.
factors.visualCredibility: Polished modern legal-template design with animations, firm logo, attorney profile photos/pages and consistent branding; copyright notice current (© 2026).
factors.navigation: Clear header nav with practice-area hubs (Family Law, Criminal Defense, Personal Injury), Our Firm, Results, Testimonials, Blog, Contact; separate desktop and mobile menus.
factors.contentClarity: Plain-language practice pages with FAQ-style sections ('Is Hiring an Attorney Necessary...?'); bios are detailed and specific (trial counts, schools, career timeline).
factors.callsToAction: Repeated 'Contact Us Today' / 'Call today' CTAs, header and footer phone numbers for both offices, and CTA banners; strong CTA density.
factors.contactFormQuality: Contact page form collects name, phone, email, new-client status and message with field validation and an SMS-consent disclosure; no spam-captcha observed in extracted markup.
factors.localPositioning: Explicitly Denton-positioned: H1 'Denton Lawyers', Denton address and geo coordinates in LegalService schema, Google Maps link, plus a dedicated Sulphur Springs location page for Hopkins County.
factors.trustSignals: Results page (anonymized case outcomes), testimonials page, Avvo Client's Choice 2015 badge (dated), Super Lawyers Rising Stars 2023-2026 for Theresa Goline (external profile), attorney bios with 50+ jury-trial claim.
factors.appointmentBooking: No online scheduling/booking widget found; intake is via contact form and phone calls only.

sources.supports: firm name, Denton address (1413 E. McKinney St., Denton, TX 76209), phone (940) 400-0475, practice areas (Family Law, Criminal Defense, Personal Injury), Sulphur Springs second office, website-quality signals (schema, CTAs, copyright 2026)

notes: Lane assigned as 'pi' but the firm is a three-practice boutique: family law, criminal defense, and personal injury; bios and site content lean family/criminal. Second office: 429 Main St., Sulphur Springs, TX 75482, (903) 418-5605 (dedicated /sulphur-springs-attorneys/ page). Current entity formed August 2022 when Gregory Goline merged his solo firm (The Law Office of Gregory C. Goline, PLLC, founded September 2010) with Theresa Blake Goline and Rachel Roland; DCBA listing still references the predecessor name and an older phone (940-465-9872). Theresa Blake Goline ran for 367th District Court judge in Denton County in 2022. Seed facts verified correct except: seeds listed only one phone; the older 940-465-9872 number belongs to the predecessor listing, current main line is (940) 400-0475.
